_comment: Drop this into .mcp.json at the root of your project to share MCP server config with teammates. Each server below is commented out with _disabled_ — remove the prefix on the one you want. Run `claude mcp list` in-session to confirm servers load. See guides/02-db-api-access.md.

_disabled_postgres-dev._note: Read-only Postgres role. See guides/02-db-api-access.md for the SQL to create the role safely.

_disabled_stripe-test._note: Stripe test-mode keys only. Never paste a live key here — restrict live access behind human-in-the-loop.

_disabled_github._note: Use a fine-grained PAT scoped to a single repo. Rotate monthly.

_disabled_filesystem-scratch._note: Scoped filesystem access outside the repo. Useful for staging large generated artifacts.

_comment_scope: After uncommenting a server here, open .claude/settings.json and add the tools you want auto-allowed to permissions.allow, e.g. "mcp__postgres-dev__query". Leave others to prompt per-call. Never auto-allow prod-touching tools.
_comment_env_vars: Inject secrets with `op run -- claude`, `doppler run -- claude`, or `infisical run -- claude`. Never put a real API key in this file — it is checked into git.
